verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: “The basic command is: rails db:rollback”; B also starts with common case but has a preface.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits faster to the main recommendation with “The basic command is”; B is more of a surveyed “practical playbook” with extra cases.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the rollback command, targeted variants, key cautions, and stops before risky edge-case surgery.
